# Support

Thanks for using Pixel Perfect Pro. Here is how to get help.

## Questions & usage help

- Read the [README](../README.md) for setup, scripts, and environment variables.
- Check [`docs/`](../docs) for architecture, deployment, and the operations runbook.

## Reporting bugs

Open a [bug report](https://github.com/) using the **Bug report** issue template.
Include steps to reproduce, expected vs. actual behavior, and environment details.

## Requesting features

Open a **Feature request** issue describing the problem you want solved and who
it affects.

## Security issues

Do **not** file public issues for security problems. Follow
[`SECURITY.md`](./SECURITY.md).
